summary: RTE Future 400kV Line Feature Test (Iteration 10) - All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend fully functional with future line rendering, layer toggle, popup, and buffer zones.
passed_tests: === RTE FUTURE 400kV ENDPOINT (6/6) ===
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns 200 OK
Response contains LineString with 13 coordinate points (Fos→Jonquières)
Response contains 3 buffer zones (1km, 3km, 5km) as Polygons
Buffer zone colors correct: red (#ff4757) 1km, orange (#ffa502) 3km, yellow (#ffd32a) 5km
Metadata includes: nom, tension_kv=400, mise_en_service_estimee=~2029, description
Scoring rules present: +30 <1km, +20 1-3km, +10 3-5km, 0 >5km
=== DC SEARCH WITH FUTURE 400kV (4/4) ===
POST /api/dc/search with region=PACA includes future_400kv data (distance_m, buffer_zone, score_bonus, future_grid_potential)
Score bonus values correct based on distance (<1km=30, <3km=20, <5km=10, >5km=0)
future_grid_potential has score (0-100) and category (excellent/tres_bon/bon/moyen/faible)
Sites near line have 'future_400kv_proximity' tag
=== BBOX PARCELS (1/1) ===
GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox includes dist_future_400kv_m, future_400kv_buffer, future_400kv_score_bonus, future_grid_potential
=== PDF EXPORT (2/2) ===
POST /api/export/pdf with future_400kv data returns valid PDF
POST /api/export/pdf/dc-site for PACA site returns valid PDF
=== SCORING INTEGRATION (1/1) ===
DC search score includes future_400kv_bonus field
=== FRONTEND DESKTOP ===
Dashboard loads with COCKPIT IMMO header
Map container (Leaflet) visible
Layer toggle '400kV Future Fos→Jonq.' visible in COUCHES panel
Future line renders as red dashed polyline (dasharray=12,6, stroke=#ff0040)
Buffer zones render with correct colors (yellow 5km, orange 3km, red 1km)
Clicking on line shows popup with: 'Future ligne RTE 400 kV Fos-sur-Mer → Jonquières', '400 kV · Mise en service : ~2029', project description
Layer can be toggled on/off (line hidden when toggled off)
=== FRONTEND MOBILE ===
Mobile dashboard loads correctly
Mobile layers button visible
Layer toggle '400kV Future' visible in mobile layers panel
=== PARCEL DETAIL SECTION ===
ParcelDetail component has data-testid='future-400kv-section'
Shows: Distance à la ligne, Zone (chaude/stratégique/opportunité), Bonus scoring, Potentiel réseau futur
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses rte_future_line.py for line coordinates and buffer generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTE Future 400kV line feature fully tested. Key endpoints: 1) GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns GeoJSON line + 3 buffer zones + metadata + scoring rules. 2) POST /api/dc/search includes future_400kv object with distance_m, buffer_zone, score_bonus, future_grid_potential. 3) GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox includes future_400kv fields. Frontend: Layer toggle '400kV Future Fos→Jonq.' in COUCHES panel, line renders as red dashed polyline, buffers render with correct colors, popup shows project info. ParcelDetail shows future 400kV section when parcel has dist_future_400kv_m. The line uses static approximate route (not live RTE data) - this is BY DESIGN.

rte_future_400kv_endpoint.returns: GeoJSON line (13 points) + 3 buffer polygons (1km/3km/5km) + metadata + scoring rules

feature_verification.frontend_layer_toggle: 400kV Future Fos→Jonq. in COUCHES panel (desktop) / 400kV Future (mobile)

mocked_api_note: The future 400kV line uses a static approximate route from rte_future_line.py, not live RTE data. This is BY DESIGN because the exact route is not publicly available yet.
